headline: Kroger’s Refrigeration Settlement Recasts ESG Risks And Long Term Cash Priorities
summary: Kroger (NYSE:KR) has agreed to invest US$100 million to retrofit or replace 600 refrigeration units following a Department of Justice action tied to alleged EPA violations. The settlement includes a civil penalty and commits Kroger to stricter refrigerant management and long-term monitoring of emissions. The agreement addresses what regulators described as a decade-long pattern of environmental compliance issues across the company’s operations. Kroger operates one of the largest supermarket...

headline: Lottie Woad wins Kroger Queen City Championship for 2nd LPGA Tour title
summary: CINCINNATI — Lottie Woad held off Haeran Ryu on a gusty Sunday afternoon at Maketewah Country Club in the Kroger Queen City Championship. Three strokes ahead of playing partner Amanda Doherty and...
